description: StreamData model. Defines the abstract Archive base, RawArchive (instant measurements), RollupArchive (derived bucketed-aggregation archives), TimeRangeArchive (externally pre-aggregated [from, to) windowed data), and supporting enum/record types. 1.1.0 → 1.2.0 renamed CkArchive → Archive (abstract) + introduced RawArchive; 1.2.0 → 1.3.0 adds TimeRangeArchive (additive, no entity migration needed). Loaded only when StreamData is enabled at the instance level.
